Title: Enacts the Creating Lasting Access to Supported and Inclusive Careers for New York (CLASSIC NY) act
Summary: Establishes a disability employment innovation fund; authorizes the issuance of "Classic NY" series license plates consisting of reissued historical license plate designs; authorizes the commissioner of motor vehicles to identify, reserve, and auction certain license plate configurations that are determined to have elevated market value; directs proceeds of "Classic NY" series plates and any auctioned plates to be deposited into the disability employment innovation fund.
LawCode: Add §99-uu, St Fin L; add §404-ff, V & T L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the state finance law and the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to enacting the "Creating Lasting Access to Supported and Inclusive Careers for New York (CLASSIC NY) act"
